metadata.note: Quick Phase-3 compare: same harness as gateway-relay baseline, ladder trimmed to 50+500 with 100 requests/level.

gateway_pool_env.note: GatewaySettings.upstream_http_max_connections defaults to 100 / keepalive 20; not exposed via AGENT_BOM_* env today. Tuned mode cannot enlarge the gateway pool without a code/CLI change.

python_run.gateway_metrics_tail:
# HELP agent_bom_auth_failures_total API authentication failures by reason
# TYPE agent_bom_auth_failures_total counter
agent_bom_auth_failures_total{reason="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total Requests rejected by a rate limiter
# TYPE agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total counter
agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total{bucket="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_compliance_exports_total Compliance evidence bundles exported by signing algorithm
# TYPE agent_bom_compliance_exports_total counter
agent_bom_compliance_exports_total{algorithm="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total Total bytes of compliance bundles served by framework
# TYPE agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total counter
agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total{framework="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_scan_completions_total Completed scans by final status
# TYPE agent_bom_scan_completions_total counter
agent_bom_scan_completions_total{status="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_scan_jobs_active In-flight scans currently queued or running
# TYPE agent_bom_scan_jobs_active gauge
agent_bom_scan_jobs_active 0
# HELP agent_bom_gateway_relays_total Multi-MCP gateway relay events by upstream and outcome
# TYPE agent_bom_gateway_relays_total counter
agent_bom_gateway_relays_total{upstream="echo",outcome="forwarded"} 640
# HELP agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total Cloud authorization evidence collections by posture
# TYPE agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total counter
agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total{provider="none",status="indeterminate"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_authorization_evidence_gaps_total Cloud authorization evidence gaps by reason code
# TYPE agent_bom_authorization_evidence_gaps_total counter
agent_bom_authorization_evidence_gaps_total{provider="none",reason="none"} 0

gateway_pool_env.note: GatewaySettings.upstream_http_max_connections defaults to 100 / keepalive 20; not exposed via AGENT_BOM_* env today. Tuned mode cannot enlarge the gateway pool without a code/CLI change.

# HELP agent_bom_auth_failures_total API authentication failures by reason
# TYPE agent_bom_auth_failures_total counter
agent_bom_auth_failures_total{reason="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total Requests rejected by a rate limiter
# TYPE agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total counter
agent_bom_rate_limit_hits_total{bucket="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_compliance_exports_total Compliance evidence bundles exported by signing algorithm
# TYPE agent_bom_compliance_exports_total counter
agent_bom_compliance_exports_total{algorithm="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total Total bytes of compliance bundles served by framework
# TYPE agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total counter
agent_bom_compliance_export_bytes_total{framework="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_scan_completions_total Completed scans by final status
# TYPE agent_bom_scan_completions_total counter
agent_bom_scan_completions_total{status="none"} 0
# HELP agent_bom_scan_jobs_active In-flight scans currently queued or running
# TYPE agent_bom_scan_jobs_active gauge

# HELP agent_bom_gateway_relays_total Multi-MCP gateway relay events by upstream and outcome
# TYPE agent_bom_gateway_relays_total counter
agent_bom_gateway_relays_total{upstream="echo",outcome="forwarded"} 220
# HELP agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total Cloud authorization evidence collections by posture
# TYPE agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total counter
agent_bom_authorization_evidence_total{provider="none",status="indeterminate"} 0

# TYPE agent_bom_authorization_evidence_gaps_total counter

decision.rationale: Go sidecar improves p95 modestly (~8% at concurrency 500) but remains far above the 50 ms Go-gate SLO (python 1447 ms vs go 1326 ms). Keep Python as default pure-relay; retain the optional go flag as an experimental path only. Do not promote the sidecar to a documented production default without a further pool/tuning investigation.
